results.command: ART=artifacts/optimization/frankenredis-ohsk5/pass126-fused-get; PORT=6403; SERVER=/data/tmp/cargo-target/release-perf/frankenredis; BENCH=/data/tmp/cargo-target/release-perf/fr-bench; LOG="$ART/reversed-candidate-server.log"; JSON="$ART/reversed-candidate-last.json"; "$SERVER" --port "$PORT" >"$LOG" 2>&1 & srv=$!; sleep 0.15; "$BENCH" --port "$PORT" --workload get --clients 50 --requests 1000000 --pipeline 16 --json-out "$JSON" >/dev/null; rc=$?; kill "$srv" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$srv" 2>/dev/null || true; exit $rc

ART=artifacts/optimization/frankenredis-ohsk5/pass126-fused-get; PORT=6404; SERVER="$ART/frankenredis-baseline"; BENCH="$ART/fr-bench-baseline"; LOG="$ART/reversed-baseline-server.log"; JSON="$ART/reversed-baseline-last.json"; "$SERVER" --port "$PORT" >"$LOG" 2>&1 & srv=$!; sleep 0.15; "$BENCH" --port "$PORT" --workload get --clients 50 --requests 1000000 --pipeline 16 --json-out "$JSON" >/dev/null; rc=$?; kill "$srv" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$srv" 2>/dev/null || true; exit $rc
